sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41321" key="e)pitetra/fatai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτετράφαται</orth>, <sense id="n41321.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπιτρέπω</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:1:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
